checks.name: Control Environment
checks.evidence: IMMUTABLE_CORE_PROTECTION (G0) + Z3 formal proof + blockchain audit

checks.name: Communication
checks.evidence: Telegram bot notifications + Grafana dashboards + alerting webhooks

checks.name: Risk Assessment
checks.evidence: Red team (18 attacks) + genetic algorithm (15 bypasses) + adversarial training

checks.name: Monitoring
checks.evidence: Prometheus + Grafana (9 panels) + 8 alert rules + Falco runtime security (7 rules)

checks.name: Control Activities
checks.evidence: 3-layer safety filter (regex+BERT+LLM judge) + OPA Gatekeeper (4 policies) + Cilium network policies

checks.name: Access Controls
checks.evidence: OAuth2 + mTLS + zero-trust + Vault secrets + Cilium FQDN filtering

checks.name: System Operations
checks.evidence: CI/CD (GitHub Actions + Tekton) + ArgoCD GitOps + Helm + auto-scaling

checks.name: Change Management
checks.evidence: Git version control + CI/CD pipeline + ArgoCD auto-sync + pre-deploy backup

checks.name: Risk Mitigation
checks.evidence: Disaster recovery (5-tier, RTO 30min) + Velero backups + multi-region failover + chaos engineering

checks.name: Environmental Protections
checks.evidence: Multi-region K8s federation (EU/US/Asia) + auto-scaling + health checks

checks.name: Recovery Infrastructure
checks.evidence: Velero daily backup + Restic 6h file backup + DR runbook + monthly DR test

checks.name: Confidentiality — Encryption
checks.evidence: mTLS (Istio) + Vault secrets + DP (PII redaction) + HE simulation + TEE simulation

checks.name: Confidentiality — Data Disposal
checks.evidence: TTL on cache (30-day) + Velero retention policies + LLM cache clear command

checks.name: Processing Integrity
checks.evidence: 3-model consensus vote + BERT semantic verification + Z3 formal proof + blockchain tamper detection

checks.name: Privacy — Data Mapping
checks.evidence: GDPR data subject access request (DSAR) + data inventory in compliance report

checks.name: Privacy — Data Retention
checks.evidence: Cache TTL 30d + backup retention (30d daily, 90d weekly) + auto-cleanup

checks.name: Privacy — Data Disposal
checks.evidence: cache-clear command + Velero TTL + Restic retention (7d/4w/12m)

checks.name: Lawful basis for processing
checks.evidence: Legitimate interest: bot processes user messages to provide LLM service. No personal data stored beyond session.

checks.name: Consent management
checks.evidence: User voluntarily sends messages to bot. No tracking, no cookies, no third-party analytics.

checks.name: Right of access (DSAR)
checks.evidence: DSAR endpoint: python3 v956_compliance.py dsar --user ID. Returns all stored data for user.

checks.name: Right to rectification
checks.evidence: No user profile data stored. Messages are ephemeral (processed, not persisted).

checks.name: Right to erasure (right to be forgotten)
checks.evidence: python3 v956_compliance.py delete --user ID — deletes all cached responses associated with user.

checks.name: Right to data portability
checks.evidence: DSAR returns JSON (portable format). User can export all data.

checks.name: Privacy by design
checks.evidence: Differential privacy (PII redaction) + DP budget tracking + TEE + HE + MPC + ZKP

checks.name: Records of processing activities
checks.evidence: Blockchain audit log (PoW tamper-proof) + OpenTelemetry traces + evidence.db

checks.name: Security of processing
checks.evidence: mTLS + Vault + OPA + Falco + Cilium + 3-layer safety + PQC + ZKP

checks.name: Breach notification (72h)
checks.evidence: Alertmanager → Telegram webhook + Slack webhook + 8 Grafana alert rules (Z3ProofFailed=CRITICAL)

checks.name: DPIA
checks.evidence: Risk assessment: red team (18 attacks) + chaos engineering (4 experiments) + formal verification (Z3)
